items.title: South Korea’s Shinhan Card to test real-world stablecoin payments on Solana
items.whyYouShouldCare: Shinhan Card's stablecoin payment tests on Solana could enhance real-world utility and drive adoption, boosting SOL's ecosystem credibility.

items.title: Meta Launches USDC Stablecoin Creator Payouts on Solana and Polygon via Stripe
items.whyYouShouldCare: Meta's integration of USDC payouts on Solana signifies growing institutional interest, potentially increasing liquidity and usage within the Solana network.

items.title: Bitcoin slides toward $75,000, ETH, SOL, XRP drop as oil hits four-year high
items.whyYouShouldCare: The decline in SOL's value alongside Bitcoin and ETH, amid rising oil prices, highlights vulnerability to macroeconomic factors affecting investor sentiment.
